Privacy Policy

Last updated: March 15, 2026

Overview

Burrell Technology Services S.A. ("we", "us") operates the website burrell.tech. This policy explains what data we collect, why, and how you can control it.

Data We Collect

Contact Form Submissions

When you submit the contact form, we collect your name, email address, subject, and message. This data is used solely to respond to your inquiry. We do not share it with third parties or use it for marketing purposes.

Analytics (Google Analytics)

With your consent, we use Google Analytics (measurement ID: G-BCFH7EJYP0) to understand how visitors use the site. Google Analytics sets cookies (such as _ga and _gid) to distinguish unique visitors and track page views. This data is aggregated and anonymous.

Analytics cookies are not loaded unless you click "Accept" on the cookie consent banner. If you decline, no analytics cookies are set and no data is sent to Google.

Local Storage

We store two preferences in your browser's local storage:

  • theme - Your light/dark mode preference
  • cookie_consent - Whether you accepted or declined analytics cookies

These are functional preferences stored only in your browser. They do not contain personal information and are not transmitted to any server.

Cloudflare

All traffic to this site is routed through Cloudflare, which acts as a reverse proxy and content delivery network (CDN). In the course of proxying requests, Cloudflare may process your IP address, browser user-agent, and other request headers for the purposes of delivering content, caching assets, and protecting the site from malicious traffic. Cloudflare does not set any cookies on this site.

We also use Cloudflare Web Analytics to collect aggregated, privacy-focused usage statistics. Unlike Google Analytics, Cloudflare Web Analytics does not use cookies and does not track individual visitors across sites.

Third-Party Services

  • Cloudflare - Reverse proxy, CDN, and privacy-focused web analytics. Processes request-level data (IP address, headers) to deliver and protect the site. No cookies are set. Cloudflare's Privacy Policy
  • Google Analytics - Used for aggregated, anonymous site usage statistics (only with your consent). Google's Privacy Policy
  • Alpine.js - Loaded from a CDN (jsDelivr) for interactive page elements. No data is collected by this library.

Data Retention

Contact form submissions are retained only as long as necessary to respond to and follow up on your inquiry. Google Analytics data is retained according to Google's default retention settings (14 months).

Your Rights

You have the right to:

  • Decline analytics cookies via the consent banner
  • Request access to any personal data we hold about you
  • Request deletion of your personal data
  • Withdraw consent at any time by clearing your browser's local storage and cookies

To exercise any of these rights, contact us at noah@burrell.tech.

Contact

For questions about this privacy policy, contact:
Burrell Technology Services S.A.
noah@burrell.tech
